reviews.title: Frequent disconnections.
reviews.text: It works ok, but the mouse keeps disconnecting and they keyboard is sometimes unresponsive. Since I mostly game on my PC this is extremely annoying. I do like the look and feel of the keyboard and mouse, the disconnection issues are my only problem. (and since another wireless keyboard and mouse don't have the problem on the same PC, I know I don't have interference issues or badly set settings)

reviews.title: Works good
reviews.text: Bought this for my sons birthday. Gave it to him a little early. He seems to love it. He’s not had a complaint one about it.

reviews.title: Used for pc gaming
reviews.text: Works fine. Sometimes I had problems with the mouse signal, moving USB port closer to mouse helped. Keys aren’t the most comfortable but I’ll get used to them. Worth it for the money

reviews.title: Ty
reviews.text: Ty

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: My son wanted this for gaming. He enjoys the size of the keyboard and mouse. The colors are vibrant and the keys don't stick as bad as other keyboards. Would recommend for a great price.

title: Sumgsn 172 Keys Double Shot Apollo Keycaps Cherry Profile for 61/64/87/104/108 Cherry Mx Switches ISO/ANSI Layout Mechanical Keyboard
features: Production Methods-These keycaps are made of double shot craft, with good texture and clear legends, with a thickness of approximately 1.5mm, and will not be backlit.c
Wide Compatibility-It has a total of 172 keys, including various sizes of keycaps suitable for most cherry mx switches 60% 65% 95% ISO/ANSI layout mechanical keyboards.
Profile-These keycaps are ergonomically designed Cherry profile keycaps that can provide you with a comfortable typing experience, better for work and gaming.
Packaing-This product is packaged with ABS keycaps tray with tray cover and comes with a key extractor, which can effectively protect the keycaps during transportation and avoid scratches and stains.
Warm Tips-Only keycaps, not a keyboard. if the keycaps missing or broken, please contact customer service to send you new keys.

reviews.title: Great set
reviews.text: Bought these for a budget build, my set was perfect. Quality exceeded expectations.

reviews.title: Spectacular!
reviews.text:
all i have to say is, get these keycaps. i was truly surprised at the quality of these keycaps. they feel really nice, solid, and with a little grain on the top that are very comfortable. Pricewise i think these are right on. At about $50 the quality is really good without the wait and the much higher prices of some other premium ABS...the colorway is one that i really like. I have always had a handful of colorways i wanted, the botonical, these Hammerhead, modern dolch, etc. the legends are pretty consistent with a few fonts thinner than others but i count 2 keys in my 60% board. not bad and i don't really notice it. i really like the color scheme more than i would notice the font issues.

Now i only wish i would have have a bigger board, 75% or TKL to take advantage of the other keys. geez keyboard world you will bankrupt me.

Very beautiful set. i'm coming back to my 60% for a little while.

reviews.title: Lovely colors, plenty of options!
reviews.text: Key caps look really great. Tons of combinations of caps for just about every layout. I threw it on an old WYSE WY-60 keyboard and it had some uncommon unit sizes for a few keys. Worked out great after finding keycaps that fit its spot. I had to grind down the edges of a few keys to fit them nicely. A modern keyboard will have no compatibility issues without a doubt!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Although it was pricey I loved the color scheme and wanted it. It has extra bits like longer or shorter space bar and ctrl, alt keys in case your board needs them.

reviews.title: Quality keycaps
reviews.text:
Well built and produced keycaps. This keyboard includes keys for Aifei, not sure if they are the ones who made these keycaps or the ones they are cloning.

Very nice and bright colors, font looks great.

Though this set seems to have a bit of lower profile and standard keycaps. So just a heads up on that.

Overall I am happy with these Keycaps.

reviews.title: CUTE!
reviews.text: Love it so much and so cute in person!

title: DROP + Matt3o MT3 Susuwatari Custom Keycap Set, ABS Hi-Profile Keycaps, Doubleshot Legends, Cherry MX Compatible Set for Ortholinear Mechanical Keyboards (Ortholinear)
features: A GROUNDBREAKING PROFILE, BACK FOR MORE: Sculpted in Hi-Profile, Matt3o’s groundbreaking MT3 /dev/tty custom keycap set changed the way we type.

FROM THE IBM TERMINAL TO THE DESKTOP: Based on the profile form the iconic IBM beamspring terminals of the 1970s, this custom set is fully sculpted in Hi-Profile. From its heavily slanted design to the scooped, contoured tops of each cap, the set recreates the feel of vintage keyboards.

DOUBLESHOT LEGENDS: As opposed to a dye-sublimiation process, these doubleshot legends are permanently molded inside the keycap, thus becoming an integral part of it. This ensures reliable legends and continuity throughout the set.
ORTHOLINEAR: For ortho keyboards like the Drop Planck, Preonic, and other boards with similar layouts.
SPECS: Produced by Drop and designed by Matt3o, ABS Hi-Profile MT3 keycaps, Doubleshot legends, MX compatible, and Fully sculpted based on IBM beamspring keycaps.

reviews.title: Absolute necessity on ortholinear boards
reviews.text:
These keycaps are thick, double shot so they will never fade, and sculpted. With ortholinear keyboards, these keycaps really help adjusting to smaller modifer key size and different key layout.

Pros:
1. Thick: This helps lower the pitch of the sound, which makes it sound quieter.
2. Doubleshot ABS: No wearing out the legends. The font is also fairly thick, making it much more legible than some other keycaps.
3. MT3 profile: The sculpted profile really makes it very comfortable to use and helps reduce hitting the wrong keys. No sharp edges due to the spherical shape. Very enjoyable for typing. The profile is much higher though so that could be an issue for some people.
4. Multiple profile options for certain keys: For example, the Ctrl and Esc keycs come in profiles that would allow it to be the top row or 3rd row. Space bar comes as two 1u, two 1.5u, and one 2u.
5. Storage tray and box: This seems silly to put as a pro but the tray and box it comes with make it easy to store unused or keycaps it replaced. Other Keycaps come in a zip lock bag that will just be a jumbled mess.

Cons:
1. Price. This is really expensive for a set of keycaps but this is the normal price for any specialty keycaps. It is what it is.
2. Limitation of scultped profile: Putting key profiles meant for row 1 in row 3 feels awkward so you might end you designing your keymap partially based on keycap profiles. Also might end up rotating some keycaps like row 5 Raise or Lower layer keycaps to make it more comfortable.
3. ABS option only. The PBT version is in white only. So if you prefer the color with the material that it isn't made it, then you're out of luck.
4. Limited to buying sets if you need extra keys: If you need more keys, you have to order a set. I would like to have more 1.5u blank keycaps but don't want to buy multiple sets just for the few pieces I want.

reviews.title: I like them
reviews.text:
These are my daily drivers, I use them on a Drop CTRL with Glorious Panda switches. Initially I thought the MT3 profile was disorienting, but after using them for a while, I am quite fond of it. I acknowledge that not everyone will like this profile though, and that should be considered if you are buying this product (or any like it). If you can find an MT3 set to try first before dumping about two hundred dollars on keycaps, it would be a **very good** idea. Other things go without saying, the thickness is very good the weight on my switches feels good and not like its making keys too easy to press or anything. I really like the theme, but all of that considered, I bought this specifically for the VI keys (hjkl with arrows) because I thought they looked super cool.

The price for these keycaps is a good deterrent for most people, for good reason. However this high of a price is pretty standard for high quality keycaps, as well as the Drop.com-exclusive MT3 profile.

This leads me to the value for money, its expensive and definitely should only be bought if you have a hankering to spend money on some expensive keycaps or you really really like having a specific row of keycaps.
Brightness is a 1 star because they're not shine-through keycaps, as they should be.
Gaming is a 4 star because, like, Sure? nothing about these keycaps keep you from gaming.

reviews.title: Best 3rd party caps I've ever owned.
reviews.text:
I really liked the esthetics of these key caps because I was looking for something which resembled "Old Nasa" feel, and these were the best I could find. The ergonomics were also great and everything has a very nice and snug fit, unlike the original keycaps that came with my CTRL keyboard.

I only wish that the "additional" buttons came with the normal key caps for the money I spent on the original "package". $30 for about 10 extra keys I can use on my ten keyless is VERY steep.

reviews.title: Best keycap set
reviews.text: I love this set. Worth every penny.

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous
reviews.text: Wonderful keycaps , goes great on my Nyquist Keyboard, looks professional yet custom, I highly recommend.

title: YUNZII AKKO CS Switch, 3 Pins for DIY MX Mechanical Keyboard, 45 pcs (Ocean Blue Switch)
features: 【About AKKO CS Switches】 AKKO Custom Series (CS) switches are the newly designed 3-pin switches for customers who have specific typing and gaming needs. Each package has 45 switches. Six types of switches are available and no matter which kind of typing feeling you want, we cover it all.

【Compatibility】AKKO CS switches are designed with a general MX structure so that they can fit most keycaps sets. The switch has 3 pins but also fit in all 3 pins and 5 pins keyboards. Based on the strong compatibility, you can easily change the switch and customize your mechanical keyboard.
【Built-in LED Slot 】The AKKO CS switches are equipped with a north-facing LED slot for LED modification. It is also compatible with SMD LED, provides more fun and options for keyboard enthusiasts.

【Durable Lifespan & Improved Performance】With a lifespan of approximately 50 million times of keystrokes, you are assured of high quality and a long lifespan. The CS switches feature a spiral spring design that can make the typing more comfortable.

【Ocean Blue Tactile Switch】The tactile bump of the Ocean Blue switch is at 0.55mm and it ends at 1.88mm, which gives long-continued feedback. Different from the blue and brown switch, the Ocean blue switch has a medium tactile position that can give you an excellent experience in typing and gaming.

reviews.title: Very good for the price
reviews.text: I'm not a mechanical keyboard connoisseur, but needed to replace the switches on my cheap Redragon keyboard to get rid of the loud clicking noise. The original switches were blue switch clones and the clicks will wake up the neighbors. These are cheap enough that I decided to give them a try. They are pretty good in terms of touch and sound, from my perspective and my use. Will definitely resort to these again in the future if I need to replace keyboard switches, especially for budget keyboards.

title: dagaladoo XVX 189 Keys Double Shot Keycaps, PBT Custom Keyboard Keycaps Full Set, XVX Profile Keycaps for 60% 65% 70% 100% Cherry Gateron MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard, Black/Purple
features: Full 189 keys PBT keycaps set, including 108 standard keys, 61 supplementary keys and 20 invert color supplementary keys for most 61/64/66/68/84/87/96/98/100/104/108 mechanical keyboards.
Double shot design keycaps, made from two colors material molded into each others, make the keycaps characters maintain the vibrance and saturation, clear and not fade.
XVX profile keycaps, ergonomic height design similar than Cherry profile, while increasing the contact surface between the finger and keycaps, bring you a comfortable typing experience.
Made from high content PBT material, 0.2cm extra-thick keycaps wall, which is provide top-notch durability, excellent touch and grease resistance.
Minimalist theme style and classic color matching, with a large number of personalized complement keys, you can DIY different styles of keyboards according to your own ideas.

reviews.title: Fits Royal Kludge 90% and Keychron K10!
reviews.text: I like all the extras. The quality of the PBT is grainy in texture, so if that's the kind of thing you're in to, then these won't disappoint. Not shine through, although the advertisement never claims they are. No light is coming through these from your board. The XVX profile is nice. Many extra key options- this set has fit several boards from several brands- not something you see for the price point! Quality printing and nice font on the caps. The keys feel good to type on when used with a clicky or linear switch. They are a bit heavy, so a lighter switch wouldn't be a bad option. I don't like to use these on tactile switches due to the mushy that these caps add to the keys. O Rings did not help these keys IMO.

reviews.title: Random assortment of loose keys
reviews.text: Expected a full set of keycaps, instead received a box containing three bags of loose keys, missing multiple letters, numbers, function keys, etc. Might be good for a concept art project, but not for a working keyboard.

reviews.title: Some keys misaligned with switch stems.
reviews.text: The keys have a nice touch, sound and printing however some keys, particularly my "O" key are a misaligned with the switch stem causing it to stick up a little higher than the "I" and "P" on either side. I did not mistake a "0" for an "O".

reviews.title: Seem to be good quality, but I hate the XVX profile
reviews.text:
These seems to be good quality keycaps, I have no issues with them at all. I have put them on multiple boards now, and I haven't had any break or scratch. Colors are accurate and legends are clear. No complaints there.

My one gripe is the XVX profile. It takes a lot of getting used to (like any new profile would), but the surface area of the keys is much larger than most other profiles. Therefore, when typing, it feels as if your fingers have to travel significantly further to reach the next key. It also makes it much, much easier to fat finger extra keys. If I had realized how much more surface area there was, I would not have purchased these. However, they do look great, they were cheap, and they sound pretty good too.

reviews.title: Great keycaps, andd even better customer service!
reviews.text: I wanted to find some PBT keycaps that were double-shot and gave some aesthetic flair to my $15 108 full sized mech keyboard with brown switches.  They fit just fine, and give a different, yet, pleasing sounds and feel to the keyboard.  I wanted non-see through keycaps in order to hide most of the LED rainbow glare.  The backlit effect is, again, very pleasing.  The keycap set that I originally ordered was missing the F9 key.  I contacted their customer service through Amazon, and got a reply back right away and arranged for a replacement set to be shipped out.  Got it the new set the day after, and it was complete.  Will purchase from this seller again whenever I need/want new keycaps.  Very confident if something is wrong, will be taken care of in a timely matter.

title: Coral Sea Keycaps 108 PBT Heat Sublimation OEM Profile Keycap for Cherry Mx Gateron Kailh Switch Mechanical Keyboard
features: 【PBT Dye Sublimation】With high-quality PBT keycaps and an anti-grease coating, these 108-key keycaps provide top-notch durability and a great feel for your typing. Advanced five-sided sublimation technology makes the pattern not fade.
【Ukiyoe Style】Exquisite Ukiyo-e style bring a new experience. the keycaps are crafted with extra-thick walls fit for intensive gaming that produce satisfying, solid keystrokes.

【Excellent Craftsmanship】Using injection molding technology, waterproof and dustproof design, easy to clean up dirt. Floating keycap design, uniform light transmission, making the lighting effect obvious.
【OEM Profile Keycaps】 This keycap set is OEM profile which is higher than Cherry profile. It is not easy to fatigue after long-term use and has better comfort.
【Warm Tips】Keycaps only, The keyboard in the picture is only for the demo and is not for sale.

reviews.title: Looks great, types great
reviews.text:
The caps are thick and wide so typing on them is a pleasure. I also love the oriental graphics of ocean waves and whales. The only gripe would be the packaging box is a bit robust in need of better designs and material. Otherwise, this is a great product. Oh also better font selection would be better too, especially the non-capitalized letters on the pause vs page up vs page down vs delete vs insert buttons. They seem inconsistent.

I would pay an extra $5 if this keycap set supports 65% or 68% design.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text:
Overall it's a decent set and a good value. However, I noticed a number of stains on the keys, incorrect legends (the n in the End key), reversed prints (colon/semicolon and apostrophe/quotation were swapped), and misaligned legends (the F9 is not in line with the other F keys).

I would probably not buy from this seller or manufacturer again due to this.

reviews.title: Not great
reviews.text: My son got it for gaming and we returned it after one day because the keys were sticking. That’s clearly not ideal for a gamer.

reviews.title: So far so good! Note to buyers with costar stabilizers
reviews.text: Nice quality for the price, easy to install, keys came in a plastic tray so you can store your old keycaps in order if needed. Note to those with costar stabilizers, the key caps do not come with MX Keycap Stabilizer Inserts... so if your old keys are like mine and the old ones are apparently glued in, you'll need these to finish the keyboard. You can find them to 3d print pretty easily.

reviews.title: Printed partially
reviews.text: The letters are not oriented fully. Bothers me because I can lines through the letters.

reviews.title: I type so well on these
reviews.text: I didn't think a different key profile would do much for me, but my accuracy immediately went up with the XDA profile. These were a great price among the similar sets I found and were an affordable way to dive into my first customization. I wanted some kinda retro keys and I just love em!

reviews.title: Not doublshot
reviews.text:
These two keys: < and > have already worn through. These are not double shot keycaps. They are a semi-translucent keycap with a finish over it that wears through. Doubleshot has an injection molded insert inside the keycap with the translucent area cut out of the keycap.
Should you not care about that, here is some more info. They look okay in the light, but in the dark there is a strong screen glare off of them that can be distracting.

I rate one star for lying about the nature of the product.

reviews.title: eh, cheap.  removed them almost instantly.
reviews.text: slippery, their feel is very cheap and i ended up removing them and regretting my buy.  i have bought other replacment keys before.

reviews.title: I didn't try them...
reviews.text: The color wasn't what I expected so I didn't open the very nice plastic packaging before returning.

reviews.title: DOES NOT FIT CORSAIR STRAFE RGB.
reviews.text: Overall, it's pretty cool. I like it a lot. It is very smudge, and the foil is cheap so it wont last all that long.

reviews.title: Arrived missing key caps but overall pretty good if you have the right keyboard
reviews.text:
Not a keyboard, just key caps to "bling out" your existing keyboard.

I purchased the following keyboard and these key caps fit perfectly. The keyboard (not this item, which is only key caps) comes with a red plastic tool that you can use to pop out the key caps:

Redragon K551 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB LED Rainbow Backlit Wired Keyboard with Red Switches for Windows Gaming PC (104 Keys, Black)

Even the font on the key caps matches the keyboard I bought separately, and the backlighting shines through the font.

The only down side: the set of key caps is missing about 1/4 of the keys (see attached picture).

I would give it all five stars if it had arrived containing all the key caps advertised in the product listing. It was a surprise prank gift for a coworker, which is why I made do with what we got.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: This USB C cable works great! It's appears to be high quality material and I really like the coiled style. Very impressed!

✅【What You Get】1x70 PBT Keycap set (key puller included), Keycaps only, The keyboard in the picture is only for the demo and is not for sale. If you have any questions about the size of the keycap of your keyboard, please feel free to confirm with us.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Overall these are really nice keycaps that show off the light underneath well. However a few keys did have some small blemishes on the top side. The blemishes are hidden between the keys and only exists on the upper solid color portion.

reviews.title: Terrible QC, all keycaps had rough bumps
reviews.text:
I just got my white set in the mail today and they would be good keycaps if there had been better quality control. It's like they took a bunch of flawed pieces and sold them to us as a set. Like another user said, I expected the shift, caps lock and tab keys to have the words spelled out and not just arrows.

There are rough bumps and weirdly broken pieces of plastic at the top of every keycap, as you can see on my picture. It is very hard to read the keys with backlight on since the font is so thin. The keyboard photographs well but it's very hard to see what key you are pressing. I feel deceived by the company and wish I had bought the HyperX ones instead, even though I didn't like the font.

reviews.title: High quality replacement for Das
reviews.text: I purchased these for my Das Keyboard Model S (Mac). All of the keys fit, including the spacebar, and they are much higher quality than the Das OEM keys. They feel more substantial, and the sound of the keyboard is a little different, the clacking is lower pitched.

reviews.title: Really good keycaps, using on my custom mech.
reviews.text: I would give 5 stars, but one of the keys came broken from shipping. Luckily I bought for a 60key, so I didn't need that specific one.

reviews.title: great looking keycaps

features: 【Blue Gradient Keycaps】The keycap set gradually changes from blue to white, inspired by "East Dawning". At dawn, when the sun in the east exceeds the horizon, the blue sky gradually reveals white dawn (it's dawn), which means opening a new day. A day that brings hope and confidence to your life.

【132 Custom Keycaps Set】Blue Gradient Keycaps besides the basic full keycaps, this set also contains extra replacement keycaps. It provides more fun to match keyboards with different layouts, no matter your keyboard is 60%, 65%, 75%, TKL, 100% or 108 key mechanical keyboard, adding color to your desktop, it is the perfect keycap replacement on the market.

【Comfortable Cherry Profile】Adopt the popular cherry profile on the market, the height is 2mm lower than the OEM keycap, suitable for those who like ergonomic comfortable height typing experience, if you are looking for something that can improve your gaming experience, don’t spend milliseconds come find your next key, just set this Cherry Profile PBT keycap for efficient and comfortable keys.

【PBT Keycaps with High-Quality Material】Pbt double shot keycaps adopts two-color injection molding technology and PBT material. Compared with ordinary ABS keycaps, it feels more delicate and comfortable. It is very dry and not easy to oil, not like ABS. Simplified closed characters, high hardness, never fade.

【Strong compatibility with MX Switches】132 blue keycap set in the exquisite box, it only has keycaps, not including the keyboard, it is compatible with MX structure switches, such as Cherry, Gateron, Kailh, TTC, etc., you can easily and quickly DIY your mechanical keyboard becomes the ideal and best choice when you are looking for a replacement set.

reviews.title: Just what I was looking for
reviews.text: Great quality, love that it comes with multiple different colors of the same key so that you can customize it. So happy with this purchase!!!

reviews.title: Good feeling, good overall design
reviews.text: Was able to use these keys on my gaming keyboard.  It provided a good feeling as I press on the keys.  It’s Very responsive.  The only downside to this is that the rgb lights on my keyboard does not pass through the keys…not the end of the world but overall a good set of keys.  The picture on the website is deceiving as it’s just keys to replace an existing keyboard.  It does not come with the keyboard itself.

reviews.title: You Like Red, White & Blue So Make Your Keyboard Reflect That!
reviews.text: We started doing this with our “high-end” computer buyers. We take a premium – Cherry or similar – keyboard and remove all or most of the key tops replacing them with the various colors available making a color complementary computer input device. It makes for a more interesting keyboard, which obviously is the main interface with your computer, and it gives our customers something so unique as to be one-of-a-kind. All the keyboards start with premium red, blue, brown, or black key actuators which, without exception, are the best available. That together with our customer’s keytops “artwork” gives a person something exclusive as well as offering superior functionality. The keytops come right off use the small plastic tool most of the keytop provides include with their kits and doing a whole keyboard only takes about 20 minutes. One thing you do have to watch for is the keytop height. Many times, they will make certain keys a little higher. This poses no issue unless you stick a high key in the middle of the number/letters, then this may impede faster typists. Remember each key actuator that is attached to the base of the keyboard is programmed to send a certain signal to the computer thus causing your monitor to display that letter/number or take that action. For example, if you put the “M” keytop where the “T” was that will still send a “T” to your computer and monitor. I would recommend removing and replacing 2 or 3 at a time or having a like keyboard to refer to, so the possibility for confusion is limited. All keyboards don’t have the exact layout especially in the extended section and number pad. Also, some of the higher end gaming style keyboards have extra programmable keys that are specified through the keyboard manufacturer’s software. Some of the keytop set will provide blank keys to use in these instances. Buy a couple sets and have fun making your own custom keyboard.

reviews.title: Great color for white keyboard, good quality
reviews.text: The NACODEX 129 Keys PBT Keycaps Set is a high-quality and visually appealing upgrade for any mechanical keyboard. The keycaps are made of durable PBT material and feature a JSA profile and double shot design. The pink and white color combination gives a unique touch to the keyboard, making it a great choice for those who want to personalize their setup. The keycaps are compatible with Cherry, Gateron, Otemu, and Kailh switches, making them a versatile choice for many different types of mechanical keyboards. Overall, this keycap set is a great investment for anyone looking to improve the look and feel of their keyboard.

reviews.title: !!!!!Great PCB!!!!!!!!
reviews.text:
Used this for my Switch Couture Electrotype60 amazing PCB and pretty easy to solder, especially for an amateur solderer like me, definitely will be buying another one when I have another case to build. Fit perfectly, No problems soldering, and definitely came out perfect out of the box, though I don't know how to brighten up the LED nor change the modes, I'm completely fine with the RGB cycle. I'm Typing on my new keyboard as we speak and it works perfectly, no delays, no nothing, just perfect!!!!

(I can admit I'm kinda too last to do VIA so I'm just working with it lol)

reviews.title: doesnt work correctly for gmmk tkl
reviews.text: bought these to replace the stabilizers in my gmmk tk; board ... for some reason they just dont work.  they dont correctly click in and if you put a keycap on it and take the keycap off it pulls the whole thing with it. ended up just using the gold bars and white switch part with the other stuff from my gmmk.  its better than stock at least.

reviews.title: Everglides and they are nice
reviews.text: very nice Stabilizers,  just needsa touch of lube and they are good to go

reviews.title: Cure clicky stabs
reviews.text:
Since you always gotta replace PCB manufacturer stabs, you might as well buy these. Great quality. Highly recommend full Holee mod for the best feel. Always lube your stabs folks.
highly recommend.

reviews.title: Improvement on V1
reviews.text: I have used the first version of these and they work good, but have had issues with the stabilizer wires popping out when removing keycaps.  These updated V2 have extra hook to keep the wire in place and work nicely.  These are some of the best stabilizers you can get right now.

reviews.title: I should have gotten these a while ago...
reviews.text:
I have an NK87 and the stabilizer ticking was terrible. I did all the tricks for it, but it persisted from some keys. NK sells their stabilizers for about the same price as these, so I thought I would just have to live with it. Then I just decided to get these, and am so glad I did. Ticking is gone.

Key points
1. They look extremely similar to the NKs, but there is obviously some difference.
2. Straight and flat wires - no tuning needed
3. Manufactured right - i.e. no need to clip, stems are flat
4. Came with the soulmate tuning kit. I think this helped a lot too.

Highly recommended.

reviews.title: In Love!
reviews.text: I purchased the "Life is a Journey" ASA profile pudding keycaps because of the awesome theme and color scheme. They are gorgeous, sophisticated, and they FEEL better than any other pudding keycaps I've ever had. No wobble, no cheap plastic sound. They add to the sound of the board and typing experience. Superior to HyperX. I have them paired with my Kailh Box Whites and I couldn't be happier.

reviews.title: Hey, this is nifty
reviews.text:
JUST GOT THIS LAST NIGHT -- CHECK MY PURCHASE DATE -- AND IT WORKS! FEW MINUTES TO UNDERSTAND THE APP AND CONFIGURATION BUT NOW I'M UP AND FLYING.
USING BUTTONS FOR TRANSCRIBING SHORTCUTS; HIGHLIGHTING TEXT, BOLD, UNDERLINE, LARGER, DELETE, PLAY/PAUSE, FORWARD AND REWIND AUDIO/VIDEO TRACKS.
9-KEY *DOES* WORK THE GLOBAL APPLE MEDIA KEYS -- PLAY/PAUSE, REV, FFW AND IT WILL SCRUB AUDIO/VIDEO AS NORMAL AKA HOLDING DOWN THE REWIND KEY IN QUICKTIME, FOR EXAMPLE.
THE DEPRESSING OF KEYS ARE OLD SCHOOL -- LONG THROW AND LOUD -- BUT WILL GET USED TO.
CONTOUR SHUTTLE PRO V2 WILL ALSO GET AN AUDITION.
SUPER HAPPY WITH THIS LITTLE CONTROLLER, IT'S A TIDY SQUARE ON THE TABLE, AS WELL. LONG CABLE LEAD.

reviews.title: Awesome keypad for Day Trading Hotkeys
reviews.text: This keypad is good quality. Keys are tactile and clicky. Board is solid and no flex. Cable is braided and good quality. Very happy with this device. The programming can be flashed to the hardware so you do NOT need to have the software running for this to work.

reviews.title: I live the macro board
reviews.text: I am a software developer and use this everyday. It was easy to program and I love the onscreen UI that tells me what I have mapped to each button.  I also like the ability to store multiple button sets in other “presets” on the board. Overall it works great and I am glad I picked this up.

reviews.title: very good for the price
reviews.text:
I got this for a few different use such as photoshop, gaming, and other work software.
At first, looking at the photo I thought it was a metal case, but it's just a thin metal on the top and everything is plastic. Therefore, it's really light, and when you tap the keys it sounds so hallow, so I end up opening up taping the board, and filling it with some foam. This made a bit better but not much different. As for the software it is easy to use and there are a few layers (profile) settings that you can set it up for different software if needed. Also, the software is very easy to use.

Overall for the price, it is a good macro keypad for many different uses.

reviews.title: Nice Additional Keys
reviews.text: The software couldn’t be any easier to program. Keys have a nice feel to them. You can program up to 6 layers with this software. I use it with my CNC CAD/CAM software for repetitive functions that I use most. I would buy it again.

If you're looking at this, you likely already like the look and I think they look better in person.  The keycaps are easy to install and provide good sound.  No hollow cheapness to these!

I really like the quality of the prints on these keycaps.
Also the thickness of these keycaps are even past some doubleshot ones I have.

What I find questionable.

Overall they are a great set of keycaps, going to keep using them for sure.

The keycap does fit quite tightly but I did manage to get it to fit though some may have issues with fitment. Overall it's a nice artisan but may fit tightly so be aware of that when ordering.

【Cherry Profile】This set of pbt keycaps uses the cherry height, which is higher than the XDA profile. It's ergonomically designed, so you will not feel tired even if you type or play games for a long time.

reviews.title: OMG great keycap set!
reviews.text:
I have been looking for these sets for the longest time, outside of GB and these guys have made a solid replica. i am so impressed with the quality and feel of these Botanical keycap sets that the premium sets can remain on the shelf. They look so nice and very very close and clean to the originals.

the only way you can tell that they are not GMK is by looking at the bottom. The dye-sub is a little weak in the finish but you never look under the hood.

If you like the greenery landscape or the color great fanatic this is the best set. It's super clean, subtle, and sounds great! I have this set on my KBD67 Lite and it sounds so much better than my ABS keycaps i paid $80 for. The texture is also very nice and I seem to be keen on this rough like texture than the ABS smoother feel. It kind of is matte if that makes sense. The legends on all the alphas are uniform, no thickness issues. The ,.? and other modifiers might have a thinner font but negligible.

I can't say enough what a great first impression these sets have given me and if they produce an "Oblivian" replica i'm jumping on it as well. Pictures to come, after I pickup my desk from all the loose keycaps.

title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

features: ✅Glorious Aura Keycaps V2 : This redesigned 145 key pudding keycap layout is compatible with GMMK Regular/PRO and most keyboard sets
✅Comes in black or white colors
✅Standard OEM Profile: Glorious Aura Pudding Keycap Set features a standard OEM profile that is widely used over many mechanical keyboards
✅Doubleshot injection legends, backlight RGB led compatible (transparent legends and sides), comes with 1 extra Glorious ASCEND ESC key and original Aura ESC key
✅Thick, High-Quality PBT Plastic Keys : Glorious Aura Pudding Keycaps are made with quality material that is resistant to wear, friction, and solvents
✅Transparent Legends, With Transparent Sides : Glorious Aura Pudding Keycaps are designed to let more light through, making your keyboard's RGB lighting more vibrant

✅Updated font compared to Glorious Aura V1 and support for more mechanical keyboards, compatible with layouts with STANDARD BOTTOM ROW. Fully compatible with Glorious GMMK Mechanical Gaming Keyboards (KEYBOARD NOT INCLUDED), please check your keyboard layout for compatibility

reviews.title: Best keycaps I have ever used.
reviews.text:
Bought these for my GMMK pro.

I have owned several mechanical keyboards, but never bought a high-end set of keycaps. Unlike every other set I've ever used, these just seem to ignore dirt and grease. I can stuff my face with a big Mac and go straight to typing, and the caps stay completely clean. I don't know how that works but I won't question it.

Other keyboards require weekly wipe downs, I have never had to do it with these caps.

They're also noticeably built well. These are going to outlast my fingers by a hundred years, likely.

reviews.title: Legend doesn’t glow like other pics
reviews.text: For my Tofu65, I do like these pudding key caps, but I’m not sure why the legends on my key caps aren’t transparent. Everyone who posted reviews with pics show their legends glowing, so I’m not sure why mine are different. My other issue is I got several duplicative keys, and I’m missing a few. For example, I only have one home key and about 4 page down keys. So that’s slightly annoying. I’ve seen some others complain about this similar thing as well. But the feel and look of these key caps are quality. Slightly disappointed.

reviews.title: Great caps work as advertised
reviews.text: Works great

title: JOMKIZ Gold Plated V2 PCB Mount Screw in Stabilizers,Translucent Smokey Keyboard Stabilizers Screw-in Keycap Stabilizers Shaft for Mechanical Keyboard Stabilizers（2U 6.25U 7U）

features: ♢Precision Design: Keyboard stabilizers screw-in stabilizers are with new Non-Stripping Wire Design, fits for MX-compatible plate.

♢Gold Plating Process: Using gold-plated stainless steel wire, anti-oxidation and beautiful.
♢Materials:With polymer nylon shell, it has higher hardness.
♢Applicable Scope: Pre-clipped Insert method, no need to clip the feet. Fit for 60% and 80% Keyboard Set.
